context: Tests whether the agent writes correct shell scripts for ElevenLabs sound effects via cURL, using the right endpoint, authentication header, output format identifiers, and crafting specific descriptive prompts.

checklist.name: Correct API endpoint
checklist.description: Uses the endpoint `https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/sound-generation` in the curl command(s)

checklist.name: Correct auth header
checklist.description: Uses `xi-api-key` as the HTTP header name for the API key (NOT `Authorization: Bearer` or another variant)

checklist.name: Auth via env variable
checklist.description: References `$ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` (or equivalent env var expansion) rather than hardcoding a literal key string

checklist.name: Correct telephony format identifier
checklist.description: When requesting telephony-compatible audio, uses `ulaw_8000` as the output_format value (NOT a made-up string like `mulaw_8000` or `phone`)

checklist.name: Output format as parameter
checklist.description: Passes `output_format` either as a query parameter in the URL or as a JSON body field — not as a separate custom header

checklist.name: Descriptive prompt — telephony clip
checklist.description: The prompt used for the telephony audio clip contains at least two descriptive elements (e.g. type of sound + context or texture)

checklist.name: Descriptive prompt — high-quality clip
checklist.description: The prompt used for the high-quality audio clip contains at least two descriptive elements

checklist.name: High-quality format identifier
checklist.description: Uses a valid high-quality format string from the documented list (e.g. `mp3_44100_192`, `pcm_44100`, `opus_48000_128`) for the high-quality clip

checklist.name: Output saved to file
checklist.description: Each curl call uses `--output` (or `-o`) to save the audio to a named file

checklist.name: POST method explicit
checklist.description: Uses `-X POST` (or equivalent) in the curl command(s)
